title: Istio
description: Istio documents overview material for Istio in the infrastructure domain. It is classified as an entity page for the service-mesh class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights Proxy & Service mesh, Envoy, and Injection rule examples, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include infrastructure, and networking, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is infrastructure / networking / istio / overview, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
